reasoning: The control SC-7(21) focuses on boundary protection and isolation of system components, which directly maps to Kubernetes network security practices. In Kubernetes, NetworkPolicies can be used to enforce ingress and egress restrictions, ensuring that pods cannot communicate with unauthorized external or internal endpoints. Additionally, using service types like NodePort can expose services to the public internet, so restricting this is crucial for boundary protection. Enabling TLS on Ingress controllers ensures secure communication, further isolating and protecting system components.
title: Boundary Protection - Boundary protection | isolation of system components employ boundary protection
